call.note: PsyopAnime $PSYOPANIME — first call. Thesis: one real trader (692PxWKE…) accumulated ~4.77% of supply, +1.19M/24h and +9.09M/7d, absorbing a sell-heavy tape (h24 873b/998s). Bear case survives: 447-account insider network = 30.96% supply. Trigger to monitor publicly: 692PxWKE flow + RugCheck insider network dilution. Exit ladder: 25% at +40%, 25% at +80%, 25% at +150%, 25% runner with 14-day hard close.
